description: SwigPay — OpenClaw Agent Smart Wallets with Squads v4 + x402 on Solana Devnet. Penn Blockchain Hackathon 2026. Bounty 1 (x402 agentic payments) + Bounty 3 (OpenClaw smart account provisioning).

userStories.title: MCP server returns HTTP 402 for paid tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the MCP server to protect paid endpoints with x402 middleware so agents must pay USDC before accessing them.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm server starts without errors
curl http://localhost:4022/health returns 200 with tool list
Calling solana_price tool without payment returns x402 payment required error
Calling ping tool returns 'pong' without payment
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Squads v4 multisig provisioned for agent
userStories.description: As a human operator, I need to provision a Squads v4 multisig for my OpenClaw agent with a USDC spending limit so I can control agent payments.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm provision creates multisig PDA visible on Solana Explorer devnet
Vault PDA is derived and logged
Spending limit PDA created with 1 USDC/day limit
SQUADS_* env vars printed and can be added to .env
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Requires HUMAN_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE58 and AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE58 in .env with funded wallets

userStories.title: Agent pays for MCP tool via x402 from Squads vault
userStories.description: As an OpenClaw agent, I need to automatically pay for paid MCP tools using USDC from my Squads vault so I can access data autonomously.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm demo calls solana_price tool and payment is confirmed
USDC transfer visible on Solana Explorer devnet with real tx hash
Payment logged to SQLite with status 'approved' and explorer_url set
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Requires vault funded with USDC from Circle faucet: https://faucet.circle.com

userStories.title: Spend limit blocks over-threshold payments
userStories.description: As a human operator, I need the spend policy to reject payments that exceed per-tx limits so the agent cannot overspend.
acceptanceCriteria: enforceSpendPolicy returns approved=false for 10 USDC when perTxLimit is 0.01 USDC
Rejected payment logged to SQLite with status 'rejected'
pnpm demo Test 4 shows 'Spend limit correctly blocked the payment'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Dashboard shows agent wallet and transaction feed
userStories.description: As a human operator, I need a dashboard to see my agent's Squads vault address, daily spend, and all payment history.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm dashboard starts Next.js on port 3000
http://localhost:3000 loads without errors
Agent card shows vault PDA with clickable Solana Explorer link
Transaction feed shows payments from pnpm demo with status badges
Approve/Reject buttons visible for pending_approval payments
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Run pnpm demo first to populate the DB before checking dashboard
